blocks.text: This slice absorbs public workdir questions `Q-WS-001` through `Q-WS-006` into workspace, native-config, and runtime-upgrade SSOT.

items: Cleanup is disabled by default; only the opt-in TTL env path is active.
There is no implicit size-based or task-count-based cleanup.
Shared repo cache prune is operator-triggered only and guarded by short `repo_cache_update.lock`.
Native config is task-scoped; user-global copy/overlay is not a default.

blocks.text: Container or VM handoff remains future C4 runtime launcher/platform adapter work. C6 prepares host-side files and manifests only.
